Metadata.Description: Endpoint asset classification catalog -- attacker-centric tier (0=immediate compromise, 3=low blast radius).
Metadata.TierModel: Attacker-centric (0=immediate compromise via single asset, 3=low blast radius)

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Domain Controller (Primary)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Primary domain controller holds the AD database; full environment compromise if taken.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Domain Controller (Additional)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Additional/secondary domain controller; full environment compromise if taken.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Read-Only Domain Controller (RODC)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Cached credentials in branch sites enable credential theft and DC trust abuse.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: AD CS Server (Root Certificate Authority)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Root CA private key compromise enables forging certificates trusted across the entire forest.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: AD CS Server (Subordinate Certificate Authority)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Subordinate CA can issue certificates trusted across the domain enabling identity forgery.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Entra Connect / AD Connect Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Synchronizes on-prem AD with Entra ID with privileged credentials in both directions.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Federation Server (AD FS Primary)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Holds token signing key; compromise enables forged SAML/OIDC tokens for the entire tenant.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Privileged Access Workstation (PAW) for Tier 0 Admins
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Workstation handling tier 0 admin sessions; compromise gives attacker direct DA/EA access.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Backup Server with DC/CA Backup Data
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Backups of DCs/CAs contain ntds.dit and CA private keys enabling full identity-plane compromise.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Monitoring Server with Domain-Level Agent Credentials
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Agents installed on DCs run with domain admin context; central server compromise pivots into AD.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Key Management Services (KMS) Server with Domain-Joined Credential Store
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Activation server holding domain-joined service account credentials usable for lateral movement.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: HSM-Attached Server (Storing Root CA Private Keys)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: HSM-attached host holds keys to the kingdom; compromise enables certificate forgery.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: SAN / Storage Controller Backing Tier 0 VMs
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Storage admin can clone or detach tier 0 VM disks granting full data access offline.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Hypervisor Host Running Tier 0 Guest VMs (VMware ESXi)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Hypervisor below tier 0 guests can access guest memory/disks bypassing OS-level isolation.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Hypervisor Host Running Tier 0 Guest VMs (Hyper-V)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Hyper-V host below tier 0 guests can access guest memory/disks bypassing OS isolation.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Hypervisor Host Running Tier 0 Guest VMs (KVM)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: KVM host below tier 0 guests can access guest memory/disks bypassing OS isolation.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: vCenter / SCVMM Management Server (Managing Tier 0 Hypervisors)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Central hypervisor management plane; one console controls all tier 0 hosts and guests.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Core Router (BGP, MPLS Backbone)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Owns inter-site routing; compromise enables traffic redirection and MITM at backbone scale.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Core Switch (Spanning All VLANs)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Spans every VLAN; compromise enables cross-segment traffic capture/redirection.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Firewall Cluster (Perimeter and Internal Segmentation)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Controls every trust boundary in the network; rule changes can expose any segment.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Out-of-Band Management Network Device (iDRAC, iLO, IPMI)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: OOB management gives bare-metal control of every host on the management LAN.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Network Management Server (Cisco DNA, SolarWinds with Full Network Write Access)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Holds privileged credentials to every managed device; one box configures the whole fabric.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: SD-WAN Controller
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Centrally programs every WAN edge; compromise enables global traffic interception.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Load Balancer (Handling Auth Traffic)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Terminates TLS for ADFS/Exchange/IDP traffic; SSL key compromise exposes credentials.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Building Management System (BMS) Controller with Domain Integration
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Domain-joined OT controller bridges IT/OT trust enabling lateral movement from the OT side.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: Physical Security Controller (Badge Access, CCTV Management) with Domain Integration
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: Domain-joined physical security controller can be pivoted into AD or used to disable physical defences.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Name: OT / ICS Controller with Direct Network Adjacency to Tier 0 Systems
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier0.Reason: OT controller on the same broadcast domain as tier 0 assets enables L2 attacks against them.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Exchange Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Mail flow + extensive AD privileges historically; well-known escalation paths to DA.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: MFA / RADIUS Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Authentication broker; compromise can bypass second factor for privileged users.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: PKI Subordinate CA Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Subordinate CA can issue trusted certificates; one pivot from issuing identity-bearing certs.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: DNS Server (Non-DC Hosted)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Standalone DNS controls name resolution; attacker can MITM auth/services.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: AD FS Proxy Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Internet-exposed AD FS proxy; pivot into the federation token-signing chain.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Privileged Access Workstation (PAW) for Tier 1 Admins
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: PAW handling tier 1 server admin sessions; compromise gives attacker server-tier access.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Jump Server / Bastion Host
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Concentration point for admin sessions; credential theft target with broad downstream access.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: SIEM Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Holds collection credentials and forwarder secrets across the estate.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) Management Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: EDR console can push code to every managed endpoint; compromise enables fleet-wide RCE.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: SCCM / MECM Primary Site Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Configuration manager push installs as SYSTEM on every managed device.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Privileged Identity Management (PIM) Approval Workflow Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Mediates JIT activation of privileged roles; compromise enables stealth role assignments.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Secret Management Server (HashiCorp Vault, Azure Key Vault Private Endpoint)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Centralised secret store; compromise leaks every consumer's credential at once.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Password Manager with Admin Credential Stores
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Vaults of admin passwords; compromise yields a credential firehose.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Patch Management Server (WSUS)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: WSUS pushes signed updates to every Windows host; compromise enables fleet-wide payload delivery.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Admin Workstation Used by Tier 1 Staff Without PAW Controls
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Mixed-use workstation handling tier 1 admin tasks without PAW hardening; high credential exposure.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Network Access Control (NAC) Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Decides who joins the network at L2; bypass enables unauthorized device admission.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: VPN Concentrator / Remote Access Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Internet-edge auth point; compromise opens trusted tunnels into the internal network.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Azure Arc-Connected Server with High-Privilege Managed Identity
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Cloud-attached host with Azure RBAC; compromise pivots from on-prem to cloud privileges.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Privileged Developer Machine with Production Secrets or Pipeline Credentials
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Holds CI/CD secrets and prod-deploy tokens; pivot into supply-chain compromise.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Hypervisor Host Running Tier 1 Guest VMs
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Hypervisor below tier 1 guests can access guest memory/disks bypassing OS isolation.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: vCenter / SCVMM Management Server (Managing Tier 1 Hypervisors)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Centralised management of tier 1 hypervisors; one console, many hosts.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Distribution Switch
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Aggregates many access switches; compromise affects multiple user/server segments.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Wireless LAN Controller (WLC)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Owns RADIUS-fronted WLAN auth and AP config; compromise enables rogue WLAN admission.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Proxy Server (SSL Inspection — Credential Visibility)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: TLS-terminating proxy sees plaintext credentials in every outbound HTTPS session.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: RADIUS / TACACS+ Network Authentication Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Authenticates network device admin sessions; compromise yields network device access.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Network Packet Broker / TAP Aggregator
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Sees and routes copies of all monitored traffic; one device equals tap on the whole network.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Remote Access Concentrator (Citrix ADC, F5 BIG-IP)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Edge ADC handles auth and SSL termination for remote admin and apps; high-value target.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: DNS Resolver (Internal Recursive)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Forced resolution path for the LAN; cache poisoning enables MITM at scale.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: DHCP Server (Domain-Integrated)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Domain-joined DHCP can register DDNS records; combined with DNS attacks enables impersonation.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Network Time Protocol (NTP) Primary Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Time skew breaks Kerberos; primary NTP compromise enables wide-spread auth disruption or replay.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: SCADA / ICS Server (Non-Tier 0 Adjacent)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Supervises industrial processes; compromise has safety/operational impact even if not adjacent to tier 0.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Industrial IoT Gateway with Network Bridging
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Bridges OT and IT networks; compromise creates a path between segmentation zones.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: UPS Management Controller (Power Disruption Potential)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Compromise enables timed power loss to data center equipment.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: HVAC Controller (Data Center Environment Impact)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Compromise can overheat the data center triggering thermal shutdowns.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Building Automation System (BAS) Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Operates lighting/access/HVAC; broad facility impact if compromised.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Medical Device Management Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Manages patient-affecting medical devices; safety-critical systems with regulatory exposure.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Surveillance / CCTV Management Server (Non-Domain Integrated)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Camera management with footage and physical security visibility; useful for recon/attack staging.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: IT Staff Personal Workstation (Helpdesk, Sysadmin, Network Engineer)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Cached credentials, admin tools, RDP session history; compromise yields broad lateral movement.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: IT Management Laptop (Used for Remote Administration Without PAW)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Mobile admin platform without PAW protections; high credential exposure off-network.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Security Operations Workstation (SOC Analyst)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: SIEM/EDR console access from analyst workstation; pivot into security tooling.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Name: Senior IT Personal Workstation (IT Manager, Architect)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier1.Reason: Broad cross-domain access scope and approval rights; spear-phishing target.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: File Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Holds business data and shares; data exfiltration/ransomware target with workload-level impact.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: SharePoint Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Collaboration platform with sensitive content; exploitable for data theft and webshell deployment.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: SQL Server Hosting Sensitive Databases
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Sensitive data store; compromise enables PII/financial-data theft.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Citrix / RDS Session Host
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Multi-user shared sessions; one compromised host yields multiple users' tokens/credentials.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Web Application Server with Entra Integrated Auth
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Entra-integrated app surface; SSRF/token theft can pivot to identity scope.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: API Gateway Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Aggregates internal APIs; compromise leaks tokens used across services.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Collaboration Server (Teams On-Prem, Skype for Business)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Enterprise comms platform with credential and message visibility.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: HR and Identity Lifecycle Management Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Authoritative source for joiners/movers/leavers; compromise enables persistence via fake hires.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Internal Certificate Registration Authority (RA) Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Approves certificate requests; compromise enables issuance of low-tier identity certs.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: IT Service Management Server (ServiceNow, Jira)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: ITSM holds change/approval data and integration credentials to many systems.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Log Aggregation Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Holds collected logs and forwarder credentials; data integrity target.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: DevOps / CI-CD Build Agent
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Builds and deploys code; supply-chain risk with scoped credentials.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Container Orchestration Node (Kubernetes Worker)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Runs application workloads; container escape gives node-level access.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Hypervisor Host Running Tier 2 Guest VMs
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Hypervisor below tier 2 guests; compromise affects all hosted workloads.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Access Layer Switch (User-Facing VLAN)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Edge switch on user VLAN; L2 attacks limited to its broadcast domain.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Wireless Access Point (Managed)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Managed AP exposes wireless edge; compromise limited to local RF coverage.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Network Monitoring Appliance (Read-Only)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Read-only network telemetry consumer; recon value but limited write impact.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Standalone DHCP Server (Non-Domain Integrated)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Non-domain DHCP; address allocation impact, no AD pivot.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Content Filtering / Web Proxy Appliance
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Outbound URL filter without TLS inspection; bypassable but useful for egress control.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: VoIP / SIP Gateway
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: PSTN-bridging telephony gateway; toll fraud and call interception risk.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Smart Meeting Room Device (Display, Conferencing System)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Networked AV with calendar/account creds; eavesdropping potential, limited lateral movement.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Environmental Sensor (Temperature, Humidity in Data Center)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Telemetry-only sensor; data integrity attack can mask conditions but no direct compromise path.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Badge Reader (Non-Domain Integrated, Isolated)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Standalone access reader; bypass affects single door, no IT plane access.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Laboratory Equipment with Network Interface
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Specialized lab gear with embedded OS; data tampering risk, limited pivot value.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: IP Camera (Isolated VLAN, No Domain Integration)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Isolated camera; espionage potential but limited pivot.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Industrial Sensor (Read-Only, No Control Plane Access)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Read-only telemetry; spoofed readings risk but no control output.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Retail / POS Terminal (Isolated Network Segment)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Payment terminal in isolated segment; compliance-relevant but contained.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Production Workstation
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Standard production workstation with business data and credentials; ransomware/data theft target.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Lab Workstation
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Lab workstation with specialised software and possibly experimental data.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Shared Device
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Multi-user shared device; cached creds from many users on one box.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Developer Workstation
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: Developer workstation with source code, package registries, possibly low-tier prod creds.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Name: Power User Workstation (Finance, Legal, HR)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier2.Reason: User has access to sensitive business data; spear-phishing target.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Print Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Hosts print queues; limited business impact, narrow lateral-movement value.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: DHCP Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Standalone DHCP without domain integration; address allocation only.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Time Server (NTP)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Secondary/non-primary NTP source; time-skew impact only at small scale.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: VoIP Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Voice service server; outage impact, limited security pivot.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Internal Wiki / Intranet Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Internal content; minor info-disclosure risk, no privileged data.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Archival / Cold Storage Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Cold archive; data-retention impact, low live-system risk.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Physical Access Control Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Standalone physical access controller; door-management impact only.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Test / Sandbox Server
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Non-production sandbox without sensitive data.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Network Monitoring Probe
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Read-only network probe; no write access to monitored devices.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Unmanaged Access Switch
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Dumb L2 switch; no admin plane to compromise.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Consumer-Grade Wireless Access Point
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Consumer AP; limited features and small RF footprint.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Out-of-Band Console Server (Isolated, Read-Only Access)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Isolated read-only console concentrator; no write to managed devices.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Standalone Print Server (Network-Connected, No Domain Join)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Non-domain print server; no AD pivot.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Smart Lighting Controller (Isolated Network)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Lighting control on isolated VLAN; comfort impact only.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Consumer IoT Device (Isolated Guest VLAN)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Consumer IoT on guest network; segmented from production.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Non-Networked or Air-Gapped Sensor
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: No network exposure; only physical access matters.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Vending Machine / Coffee Machine with Network Connectivity
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Networked appliance; minimal lateral pivot value.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Digital Signage Player (Isolated, Read-Only Content)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Display-only content player; defacement risk, limited pivot.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Wearable / Smart Badge (No Domain Integration)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Personal wearable; minor data risk, no enterprise auth.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: USB-Only Peripheral with Firmware Update Capability
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: USB-only device with updatable firmware; supply-chain risk vector but low blast radius.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Standard Employee Workstation
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Standard end-user device with user-tier privileges; ransomware target but contained.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Student Workstation
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Education-tier device; restricted access, low-value target.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Kiosk Machine
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Locked-down kiosk; single-purpose device with limited credentials.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Guest PC
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Guest-network device with minimal access; low blast radius.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Shared Classroom / Library Computer
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Multi-user education-tier device; restricted role, minor data exposure.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Development Workstation (Non-Privileged, Isolated, No Production Access)
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Dev workstation isolated from prod; supply-chain risk capped by network segmentation.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Personally-Owned BYOD Device
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: User-owned device on guest/BYOD VLAN; limited corporate footprint.

Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Name: Retired / Decommissioned Machine
Endpoint_AssetClasses_Tier3.Reason: Pending-decommission device; should be powered off/removed but flagged for cleanup.
